title: Guard raw commands for idempotency
description: When a module does not exist, bound shell/command tasks with creates, changed_when, and failed_when.
body: Use when no native module covers an operation and you must run a raw command. Do not leave a command task unguarded — it executes on every run and always reports changed, masking real drift. Actions: add creates/removes so it skips when the target already exists, set changed_when to reflect actual change from the command output, and set failed_when to define real failure. Validation signals include the task skipping on a converged host and reporting changed only when it acted. Risk boundary: an unguarded destructive command re-runs on every play — confirm idempotency before targeting shared or production hosts.
